name: global_context
description: Explore slightly stronger point/global mixing now that the hardware can absorb a bit more context work.
prompt_extra: Build on the current best boundary-supervision baseline. Make exactly one focused change in train.py. Target only global-context aggregation or how global features are fused back into per-point features. On this stronger hardware you may try a somewhat richer global descriptor or a slightly stronger fusion path, but keep the local neighborhood block conceptually unchanged.
